STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-NORMAL_PENCIL.title: 普通的铅笔
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-NORMAL_PENCIL.descripti: 每场战斗你第一次作词时，抽两张卡。
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-NORMAL_PENCIL.flavor: 普通和理所当然是什么呢......
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-SOYO_BASE.title: Soyo's Bass
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-SOYO_BASE.description: Every 3 Skill cards played, gain [blue]{AtFieldPower}[/blue] [gold]AT Field[/gold].
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-SOYO_BASE.flavor: The steady rhythm that supports everything.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-TAKI_DRUM.title: Taki's Drum
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-TAKI_DRUM.description: The 5th card played each turn is played an additional time.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-TAKI_DRUM.flavor: The beat that drives the performance forward.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ANON_GUITAR.title: Anon's Guitar
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ANON_GUITAR.description: At the start of each combat, add a random [gold]Collectible[/gold] to your hand.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-ANON_GUITAR.flavor: A guitar that always has something new to offer.
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-RAANA_GUITAR.title: Raana's Guitar
STS2_TOMORIN_MOD-RAANA_GUITAR.descriptio: Whenever [gold]Leftover Buffet[/gold] is exhausted, heal [blue]{HealAmount}[/blue] HP.
